productDisplayName: Vital Gear Unisex Olive Tacti Backpack
description: Style Note vital gear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your stuff in style with this bag from Vital Gear. With ample space for office accessories and books, the bag is best suited for college and general heavy duty use.  Product Details Olive green backpack with click clocks on the front and sides Two adjustable padded shoulder straps and a haul loop for handling ease One main zippered compartment with an insert pocket One more zippered compartment with organizer sleevesOne zippered pocket on the front Branding embossed on the front  Material and Care Blended polyester Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Size Height: 42 cm Width: 32 cm
